title: Causative have and get
explanation:
Causative have and get

Use have/get + object + past participle when someone else does something for you.

  • I had my hair cut yesterday.
  • She got her car repaired at the garage.
  • We need to have the documents translated.

questions.text: I need to [*have|get|make] my laptop repaired before the trip.
She [*got|had|made] her passport renewed last week.
They are [*having|getting|making] the house painted this month.
He [*had|got|made] his suit cleaned before the interview.
We should [*have|get|do] the contract checked by a lawyer.

exercise_sets.title: Exercise 2
exercise_sets.instructions: Choose the correct option for each gap.

questions.text: I must ____ my eyes tested soon. | *have | make | do
She ____ her phone screen replaced at the shop. | *got | made | did
They are ____ the roof fixed after the storm. | *having | making | doing
He finally ____ his documents translated professionally. | *had | made | got to
She wants to [*get|have|make] her nails done before the wedding.
They [*are having|are making|are doing] the garden redesigned.
You should [*have|get|make] that tooth looked at.
We [*had|made|did] the windows cleaned before the guests arrived.
